errorOccurred.description: Log agent errors as JSON lines

postToolUse.description: Log failed or denied tool executions
postToolUse.bash:
INPUT=$(cat)
RESULT_TYPE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolResult.resultType // empty')
if [ "$RESULT_TYPE" = "failure" ] || [ "$RESULT_TYPE" = "denied" ]; then
  mkdir -p logs
  echo "$INPUT" >> logs/tool-failures.jsonl
fi

INPUT=$(cat)
TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName // empty')
if [ "$TOOL_NAME" != "edit" ] && [ "$TOOL_NAME" != "create" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
TOOL_ARGS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs // "{}"')
CHANGED_FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_ARGS" | jq -r '.filePath // .path // empty')
if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$CHANGED_FILE" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
case "$CHANGED_FILE" in
  *.ts) npx eslint --fix "$CHANGED_FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;;
  *) ;;
esac

postToolUse.description: Format common source files after edit/create
postToolUse.bash:
INPUT=$(cat)
TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName // empty')
if [ "$TOOL_NAME" != "edit" ] && [ "$TOOL_NAME" != "create" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
TOOL_ARGS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs // "{}"')
CHANGED_FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_ARGS" | jq -r '.filePath // .path // empty')
if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$CHANGED_FILE" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
case "$CHANGED_FILE" in
  *.ts|*.html|*.scss|*.css|*.json|*.md) npx prettier --write "$CHANGED_FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;;
  *) ;;
esac

sessionEnd.bash:
INPUT=$(cat)
mkdir -p logs
TS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.timestamp // empty')
REASON=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.reason // empty')
CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty')
echo "{\"timestamp\":$TS,\"reason\":\"$REASON\",\"cwd\":\"$CWD\"}" >> logs/session-end.jsonl
